title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Rackspace India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Rackspace India
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
